message:
fix: Handle Unicode identifiers and fstring format spec escaping

- Add containsNonAscii() to detect Unicode characters in identifiers
- Escape Unicode identifiers with @"name" syntax (e.g., tenπ → @"tenπ")
- Properly escape newlines, tabs, and carriage returns in format specs
- Use double-escape for Zig string literals (\\n not \n)

Fixes test_fstring.py compilation error with tenπ variable and
format specs containing line continuations.
